title: !INSERT INTO: number of values doesn't match number of colum
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test1 (id, age) VALUES (2, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(age), 0) FROM test1));
CREATE TABLE test2 (x INTEGER, y INTEGER DEFAULT 10, z TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test2 (x, y, z) VALUES (3, NULL, 'Default');
key_bug_features: Mismatch between values and columns in INSERT statement
